recommendedArchitecture: E — Ingredient Concept + Supplier Product + Pack Variant (+ equivalence extensions)
deliveryPath: Phase 0 guard → B (variants) → D (supplier products) → E (equivalence/form)

1_isIdentityHighestLeverage.question: Is Ingredient Identity truly the highest-leverage remaining foundation problem?
evidence: OI replay: Mozzarella €744/mo false opportunity, AVILUDO +1341% supplier watch
Historical pricing PARTIAL despite sound math — input identity collapse
Extraction MOSTLY CLOSED (83%); stale DB and identity are now dominant blockers
Ginger Beer, GT Pomodor, GPT tails are narrower or harness-only

2_recipeCostingBeforeIdentity.question: Can recipe costing be safely built before new identity architecture?
2_recipeCostingBeforeIdentity.answer: PARTIALLY — yes for single-format catalogs; NO for multi-supplier production
2_recipeCostingBeforeIdentity.detail: Recipe graph (sub_recipe_id XOR) is sound. Costing math works when one pack format per concept. VL proves last-write-wins on ingredients.current_price corrupts costing when formats mix (Mozzarella catalog shows €13.69 block while Bocconcino history at €0.95/piece). Safe for pilot with manual catalog hygiene; not safe at scale without P1 variants.

3_minimumBeforeOI.question: Minimum identity improvements before enabling Historical Pricing / Opportunities / Supplier Intelligence?
3_minimumBeforeOI.answer: P0 + P1 minimum; P2 for supplier intelligence
minimum: P0: Cross-format history chain guard (blocks false ±100% signals)
P1: pack_variant_id on price_history + invoice match to variant
VL re-read to refresh stale rows
Ginger Beer volume guard before beverage SKUs
forFullSupplierIntel: Alias → variant mapping with confirm UX
doNotEnableBefore: Opportunities on ingredients with >1 pack format history
Supplier switch recommendations without equivalence check

4_whatToBuildNext.question: What should be built NEXT after this design?
4_whatToBuildNext.answer: Phase 0 cross-format history guard, then pack variant schema (P1)
ordered: 1. P0 history chain guard + OI format_change classification
2. P1 pack_variants + matching resolution + VL backfill
7. P4 OI production enablement + dashboard wire

headline: Adopt Option E as north-star; ship P0 guard immediately, then P1 pack variants and P2 supplier products. Do not enable production OI until identity-collapse cases are structurally impossible.
